prompts.input: PR #50 implements Issue #45. Issue AC: 'Login button shows user's avatar after login.' Code change: src/ui/LoginButton.tsx renders <Avatar user={user}/> on success. Confirmed in tests/test_login.tsx.
Issue AC: 'Save button is disabled while request in flight.' Code: button has onClick but no disabled prop binding. While request in flight, button still clickable.
Issue AC: 'Fast page loads.' PR implements caching. No specific number given.
Issue has 3 ACs: 'Search filters by date', 'Search results are paginated', 'Search shows 0 results gracefully'. PR implements 1 and 2, not 3.
Issue says 'API returns 200 on success, 400 on error'. PR returns 201 on success. Tests pass.
Issue AC: 'All tests pass.' PR: test coverage drops from 80% to 60%. New tests added but old ones deleted. CI green.
